---
title: 'New? Start Here'
date: '2023-08-28T17:13:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Meals and Manuscripts (MM) - Working Title'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '379903112756542272'
blogger_filename: '/p/new-start-here.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Meals and Manuscripts (MM) - Working Title/feed.atom'
---

<div style="text-align: left;"><b><i>Under Construction...</i></b></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">Welcome to Meals and Manuscripts (MM)!</h3><p>You’ve just stumbled upon a unique community that's all about Gather &gt; Eat &gt; Grow. If you're new here, you might be wondering what it's all about. Well, you’re in the right place!</p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">What We Believe</h4><p>We're a community that's deeply rooted in the teachings and practices of "The Way of Jesus." Our core values revolve around authentic relationships, academic study of biblical authors, and communal well-being. We believe in fostering a safe and inclusive space where individuals can gather, share meals, and grow both spiritually and relationally. Our gatherings serve as a local expression of Jesus' teachings, aimed at bringing people together through communal meals, shared time and resources, and meaningful conversations. We are committed to diving deep into the Bible's original context, tapping into the best of biblical scholarship to enrich our understanding and practice.</p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Why Should You Be a Part of MM?</h4><p>If you're looking for a community where you can build meaningful, long-lasting relationships while also exploring the deeper contexts of the Bible, MM is the place for you. Here, we don't just offer a seat at the table; we offer a sense of family and belonging. Our unique blend of shared meals, group discussions, and educational materials creates a welcoming environment for spiritual and intellectual growth. By becoming a part of MM, you're joining a movement committed to authenticity, community enrichment, and lifelong learning. Whether you're new to biblical study or a seasoned scholar, there's a place for you here to gather, eat, and grow.</p><p><br /></p><h3 style="text-align: left;">How to Get Involved</h3><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b>Step 1: Join Our Community</b></h4><p>Instructions on how to sign up for newsletters, join online forums, or attend the next gathering.</p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b>Step 2: Engage</b></h4><p>Recommend a few articles, videos, or educational materials that newcomers should start with.</p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b>Step 3: Attend a Gathering</b></h4><p>Details about your regular get-togethers and how to attend one.</p><p><br /></p><h3 style="text-align: left;">Our Pillars</h3><h4 style="text-align: left;">Connection</h4><p>Short paragraph on the importance of community and how MM fosters it.</p><p>At MM, we believe that the essence of spiritual growth is deeply rooted in community. In a world full of digital connections, we crave something more tangible. Our regular get-togethers—whether online or face-to-face—are designed to encourage authentic conversations and build lasting relationships. We're more than just a group; we're a chosen family walking the journey of faith together.</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Meals</h4><p>Talk briefly about the communal meals and partnerships with local businesses.</p><p>Nothing brings people together like a good meal, and we at MM take that to heart. Our gatherings often center around communal meals that offer more than just sustenance; they provide a rich setting for relationship-building. In addition, we're passionate about supporting our local community and frequently partner with local businesses to enrich our shared dining experiences.</p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Education</h4><p>Describe the educational materials and scholarly approach.</p><p>MM is committed to diving deep into the Bible's original context, making the complex simple. Leveraging a scholarly approach, we provide accessible educational materials that empower everyone, from the curious novice to the seasoned academic, to engage with the Scriptures in a meaningful way. We take advantage of the latest in biblical scholarship to bring fresh insights and new perspectives to our community.</p><p><br /></p><h3 style="text-align: left;">What's Next?</h3><p>Clear CTA (Call To Action), like joining the next gathering or subscribing to a newsletter.</p>
